Bash(git -C "E:/VSC/H5/SIC-ADS" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(assessment\): Phase 4.1 BaseDriver + WeeFIMDriver + CSIRSDriver 实现

- 新增 BaseDriver 抽象基类，提取公共逻辑（线性导航、进度计算、答案序列化）
- 新增 WeeFIMDriver（18题，7级评分，运动/认知双维度）
- 新增 CSIRSDriver（58题，T分转换，5维度感觉统合评估）
- 重构 SMDriver 继承 BaseDriver，保留 Basal/Ceiling 跳题逻辑
- 修复 getNextQuestion 动态题目数问题（使用 state.metadata.totalQuestions）
- 修复 CSIRS 保存 Schema 不匹配（使用正确的列名）
- 更新文档：PROJECT_CONTEXT.md、CHANGELOG.md、实施计划

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "E:\\VSC\\H5\\SIC-ADS" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(sdq\): remove duplicate config causing blank report data

Root Cause:
- feedbackConfig.js had TWO "sdq" key definitions
- Old format \(lines 414-619\): Object-based with normal/borderline/abnormal keys
- New format \(lines 625-909\): Array-based with levels array

- SDQDriver.generateFeedback expects array format \(levels array\)
- The old format was never used, causing dimensionDetails to be empty

Fix:
- Removed the duplicate old "sdq" configuration \(lines 414-619\)
- Kept only the new array-based configuration \(lines 625-909\)
- Now SDQDriver can correctly match scores to level configs

Verified
- Build: PASSED
- feedbackConfig.js now has single "sdq" definition with correct format

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "E:\\VSC\\H5\\SIC-ADS" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(sdq\): fix field name mismatch in Report.vue

- Changed data.score to data.rawScore to match database storage
- Fixed matchDimensionLevel to correctly use the score from stored data

Root Cause:
The dimension_scores field in database stores scores with
{ rawScore, number }` but, but the `score` property. The Report.vue
 code was expecting `data.score`, but the actual stored value is `data.rawScore`.
Fix:
- Updated matchDimensionLevel to use data.rawScore
- Also removed unused computeScoreLevel function

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "E:\\VSC\\H5\\SIC-ADS" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor\(sdq\): simplify Report.vue to use SDQDriver.generateFeedback

- Refactored loadAssessData to fully rely on SDQDriver.generateFeedback
- Removed duplicate data processing logic \(local parsing vs driver call\)
- Removed unused imports \(SDQ_DIMENSION_NAMES\)
- Removed unused functions \(matchDimensionLevel, matchTotalScoreRule, extractStructuredAdvice\)
- Simplified dimensionScores to computed property from feedback
- Simplified structuredAdvice to computed property from dimensionScores
- Added debug logging for troubleshooting

Now Report.vue is a "thin" view layer that only:
1. Loads record and student from database
2. Builds ScoreResult object
3. Calls driver.generateFeedback\(scoreResult\)
4. Binds feedback data to template

All data processing logic is now centralized in SDQDriver.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

- Provides macro-level guidance before specific dimension advice

EOF
